description_long: This object consists of a square chessboard with a classic checkered pattern of alternating green and white squares, set on a flat base. The board appears to be made of a stone or marble-like material, giving it a polished and slightly reflective surface. Two ornate chess pieces, a king and a queen, stand upright on the board, both crafted with intricate details and metallic accents, possibly gold. The king is topped with a cross, while the queen features a crown-like design with pointed elements. The chessboard's edges are clean and unadorned, with no visible border decorations or inscriptions. The overall appearance is elegant and luxurious, suitable for display in a refined urban setting such as a park or plaza.
description: A polished green-and-white checkered chessboard with two ornate, metallic-accented chess pieces (king and queen) standing on its surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the king (with cross) and queen (with crown) standing side by side on the checkered chessboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the queen piece, with the king mostly obscured, and the checkered pattern visible beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view of the chessboard, showing the backs of both the king and queen pieces on the checkered surface.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the king piece, with the queen mostly hidden, and the checkered board visible.
attribute_board_pattern: The board features a regular checkered pattern of alternating green and white squares, arranged in a grid with each square being uniform in size. The surface is smooth and polished, with no additional decorative elements or markings within the playing area.
attribute_border_design: The border of the board is minimal and unadorned, matching the material of the playing surface with no visible ornamentation, color contrast, or inscriptions. The edge is straight and flush with the playing area.
